metadata.title: Uncertainty quantification in Bayesian earthquake source inversions
metadata.description: Fortran90 and MATLAB toolset for evaluation of the covariance (and cross-covariance) matrices of Green's functions. It is specifically designed as a high-performance toolset to efficiently handle model uncertainties in Bayesian waveform-based earthquake source inversions. It features a dual-language implementation to balance computational power (Fortran90) with ease of testing and visualization (MATLAB).
